title.en: The mmWave AV PHY: Two Modes for Sending Video Wirelessly
title.zh: 毫米波 AV PHY：用两种模式无线传输视频

blocks.en: Imagine a Blu-ray player streaming uncompressed video to a TV across the room — gigabits per second, with no cable. That is exactly what the Audio/Visual (AV) mode of the millimeter-wave (mmWave) PHY in IEEE Std 802.15.3-2023 was built for. mmWave means the very high radio frequencies (here around 60 GHz) where huge bandwidth is available. The 'PHY' is the physical layer — the part of the radio that turns bits into actual waveforms. This lesson walks clause-by-clause through clause 12.4, the AV mode, so you can read the standard fluently.
blocks.zh: 想象一台蓝光播放器把未压缩的视频无线传输到房间另一头的电视——每秒数吉比特，没有任何线缆。这正是 IEEE Std 802.15.3-2023 中毫米波（mmWave）PHY 的音视频（AV）模式的设计目标。毫米波指的是非常高的无线电频率（这里约 60 GHz），那里有巨大的可用带宽。'PHY' 是物理层——无线电中把比特转换成真实波形的部分。本课逐条讲解第 12.4 节（AV 模式），帮你流畅地读懂标准。

blocks.en: Clause 12.4.1 (General) sets the big picture: the AV PHY has two cooperating modes, both built on OFDM (Orthogonal Frequency-Division Multiplexing — splitting data across many narrow subcarriers). The High-Rate PHY (HRP) carries the heavy video payload at 0.95 to 3.8 Gb/s. The Low-Rate PHY (LRP) carries beacons, control, acknowledgments, and broadcast traffic at 2.5 to 10 Mb/s. Because a video source mostly sends and a display mostly receives, devices declare an asymmetric role: HR0 (LRP only), HRRX (HRP receive), HRTX (HRP transmit), or HRTR (both directions of HRP).
blocks.zh: 第 12.4.1 节（概述）勾勒全局：AV PHY 有两个协同工作的模式，二者都基于 OFDM（正交频分复用——把数据分散到许多窄子载波上）。高速 PHY（HRP）以 0.95 至 3.8 Gb/s 承载繁重的视频负载。低速 PHY（LRP）以 2.5 至 10 Mb/s 承载信标、控制、确认和广播流量。由于视频源主要发送、显示器主要接收，设备会声明一个不对称的角色：HR0（仅 LRP）、HRRX（HRP 接收）、HRTX（HRP 发送）或 HRTR（HRP 双向）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 460 150' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='20' y='30' width='130' height='50' rx='6'/><text x='85' y='52' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Video source</text><text x='85' y='70' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>HRTX role</text><rect x='310' y='30' width='130' height='50' rx='6'/><text x='375' y='52' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='12' text-anchor='middle'>Display / sink</text><text x='375' y='70' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>HRRX role</text><line x1='150' y1='45' x2='310' y2='45' marker-end='url(#a)'/><text x='230' y='40' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>HRP video 0.95-3.8 Gb/s</text><line x1='310' y1='70' x2='150' y2='70' marker-end='url(#a)'/><text x='230' y='88' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='10' text-anchor='middle'>LRP ACK / control 2.5-10 Mb/s</text><defs><marker id='a' markerWidth='8' markerHeight='8' refX='6' refY='3' orient='auto'><path d='M0,0 L6,3 L0,6' fill='currentColor' stroke='none'/></marker></defs></svg>

caption.en: Asymmetric AV link: the source pushes heavy HRP video one way; the sink replies with light LRP control and acknowledgments the other way.
caption.zh: 不对称的 AV 链路：源单向推送繁重的 HRP 视频；接收端用轻量的 LRP 控制和确认反向回复。

blocks.en: Clause 12.4.2 (General requirements) nails down the housekeeping. Channelization (12.4.2.1): the HRP uses the standard mmWave channels, and inside each HRP channel three LRP channels are defined relative to the HRP center frequency — but only one HRP channel and one LRP channel are active at a time, paired into a single CHNL_ID. PHY-layer timing (12.4.2.2) fixes the gaps between transmissions: pSifsTime is 2 microseconds, pCcaDetectTime (the listen-before-talk sensing window) is 9 microseconds, and switching channels (pChannelSwitchTime) may take up to 1000 microseconds. Data-size limits (12.4.2.3) cap an HRP subframe body at 2^20 - 1 octets and an LRP frame at 2^12 - 1 octets, with a 512-octet minimum fragment. The Header Check Sequence, HCS (12.4.2.4), is a 32-bit CRC protecting the headers.
blocks.zh: 第 12.4.2 节（一般要求）确定各项基础规则。信道划分（12.4.2.1）：HRP 使用标准毫米波信道，每个 HRP 信道内相对于 HRP 中心频率定义了三个 LRP 信道——但任一时刻只有一个 HRP 信道和一个 LRP 信道处于活动状态，二者配对成一个 CHNL_ID。物理层定时（12.4.2.2）规定传输间的间隔：pSifsTime 为 2 微秒，pCcaDetectTime（先听后说的感知窗口）为 9 微秒，切换信道（pChannelSwitchTime）最多可达 1000 微秒。数据大小限制（12.4.2.3）将 HRP 子帧体上限定为 2^20 − 1 个八位组，LRP 帧定为 2^12 − 1 个八位组，最小分片为 512 个八位组。头校验序列 HCS（12.4.2.4）是保护头部的 32 位 CRC。

blocks.en: Why two PHYs instead of one? Sending control and acknowledgments at multi-gigabit rates would be fragile and wasteful. The robust, low-rate LRP handles signalling reliably in every direction, while the high-rate HRP is reserved purely for the bulk video payload — and HRP is used only in directed channel-time allocations (CTAs), never in shared contention periods.
blocks.zh: 为什么用两个 PHY 而不是一个？以数吉比特速率发送控制和确认会既脆弱又浪费。稳健的低速 LRP 在每个方向上可靠地处理信令，而高速 HRP 专门留给大块视频负载——而且 HRP 只在定向信道时间分配（CTA）中使用，绝不在共享的竞争期内使用。

blocks.en: Clause 12.4.3 (Modulation and forward error correction) is the signal-processing engine room. The HRP runs a 512-point FFT over 1.76 GHz of occupied bandwidth (336 data subcarriers, ~227 ns symbols); the LRP runs a 128-point FFT over 92 MHz. Forward error correction (FEC) means adding redundancy so the receiver can fix bit errors. The HRP chain (12.4.3.5 through 12.4.3.13) is rich: a splitter that can route bits into 'upper' and 'lower' branches, a 15-bit scrambler (polynomial x^15 + x^14 + 1), a Reed-Solomon outer code, an outer interleaver, a convolutional inner encoder with puncturing, then bit interleaving and constellation mapping (QPSK or 16-QAM). A standout feature is Unequal Error Protection (UEP): in clause 12.4.1 the modes split each octet's four most-significant bits (MSBs) from its four least-significant bits (LSBs) and protect the perceptually important MSBs more strongly. The LRP chain (12.4.3.6, 12.4.3.3) is simpler — a scrambler plus convolutional coding plus repetition coding that is the basis of its spatial diversity.
blocks.zh: 第 12.4.3 节（调制与前向纠错）是信号处理的机房。HRP 在 1.76 GHz 占用带宽上运行 512 点 FFT（336 个数据子载波，约 227 ns 的符号）；LRP 在 92 MHz 上运行 128 点 FFT。前向纠错（FEC）指添加冗余以便接收端修复比特错误。HRP 处理链（12.4.3.5 至 12.4.3.13）很丰富：一个可把比特分到'上'、'下'两支的分流器、一个 15 位扰码器（多项式 x^15 + x^14 + 1）、一个 Reed-Solomon 外码、一个外交织器、一个带删余的卷积内编码器，然后是比特交织和星座映射（QPSK 或 16-QAM）。一个亮点是不等错误保护（UEP）：在 12.4.1 节中，相关模式把每个八位组的四个最高有效位（MSB）与四个最低有效位（LSB）分开，对感知上更重要的 MSB 给予更强的保护。LRP 处理链（12.4.3.6、12.4.3.3）更简单——扰码器加卷积编码再加作为空间分集基础的重复编码。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  A[Input octets] --> B[Splitter EEP/UEP]
  B --> C[Scrambler x15+x14+1]
  C --> D[Reed-Solomon outer code]
  D --> E[Outer interleaver]
  E --> F[Convolutional encode + puncture]
  F --> G[Bit interleaver]
  G --> H[QPSK / 16-QAM map]
  H --> I[Tone interleave + IFFT]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  A[输入八位组] --> B[分流器 EEP/UEP]
  B --> C[扰码器 x15+x14+1]
  C --> D[Reed-Solomon 外码]
  D --> E[外交织器]
  E --> F[卷积编码+删余]
  F --> G[比特交织器]
  G --> H[QPSK / 16-QAM 映射]
  H --> I[音调交织 + IFFT]

blocks.en: Clause 12.4.4 (Frame formats) shows how those bits are wrapped on air. An HRP data unit (HRPDU, Figure 12-49) is: HRP preamble, HRP header, MAC header, HCS, then the MAC Frame Body of up to seven subframes — each subframe carrying its own HRP mode index and length in a Subframe Header field. The HRP preamble (12.4.4.2) is built from a resampled 8th-order M-sequence (a pseudo-random binary sequence). There are two LRPDU shapes: the omni LRPDU (Figure 12-50) for broadcast, beacons, and contention traffic, and the directional LRPDU (Figure 12-51) used to acknowledge HRP frames. LRP preambles come in long (12.4.4.5, for frequency sync and blind timing) and short (12.4.4.6, for quick timing) flavors, each a stack of AGC, frequency-offset-estimation, RX-diversity-training, and channel-estimation fields. The directional ACK header (12.4.4.9) even packs a per-subframe ACK Group bitmap.
blocks.zh: 第 12.4.4 节（帧格式）展示这些比特如何在空中封装。一个 HRP 数据单元（HRPDU，图 12-49）为：HRP 前导码、HRP 头、MAC 头、HCS，然后是最多包含七个子帧的 MAC 帧体——每个子帧在子帧头字段中携带自己的 HRP 模式索引和长度。HRP 前导码（12.4.4.2）由重采样的 8 阶 M 序列（一种伪随机二进制序列）构成。LRPDU 有两种形态：用于广播、信标和竞争流量的全向 LRPDU（图 12-50），以及用于确认 HRP 帧的定向 LRPDU（图 12-51）。LRP 前导码分为长（12.4.4.5，用于频率同步和盲定时）和短（12.4.4.6，用于快速定时）两种，每种都是 AGC、频偏估计、接收分集训练和信道估计字段的堆叠。定向 ACK 头（12.4.4.9）甚至打包了逐子帧的 ACK Group 位图。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 480 90' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='1.5'><rect x='10' y='30' width='70' height='34'/><text x='45' y='51' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>HRP preamble</text><rect x='80' y='30' width='60' height='34'/><text x='110' y='51' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>HRP header</text><rect x='140' y='30' width='65' height='34'/><text x='172' y='51' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>MAC header</text><rect x='205' y='30' width='40' height='34'/><text x='225' y='51' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>HCS</text><rect x='245' y='30' width='225' height='34'/><text x='357' y='47' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='9' text-anchor='middle'>MAC Frame Body</text><text x='357' y='60' fill='currentColor' stroke='none' font-size='8' text-anchor='middle'>subframes 1..7</text></svg>

caption.en: HRPDU frame format (Figure 12-49): a fixed preamble/header/HCS prefix, then a payload of up to seven subframes that may each use a different HRP mode.
caption.zh: HRPDU 帧格式（图 12-49）：固定的前导码/头/HCS 前缀，随后是最多七个子帧的负载，每个子帧可使用不同的 HRP 模式。

blocks.en: The last three clauses set the radio's quality bars. Clause 12.4.5 (Transmitter requirements) defines the transmit PSD masks (12.4.5.1, the spectral 'cookie-cutter' the signal must fit inside), Error Vector Magnitude limits (12.4.5.2, EVM — how close constellation points land to ideal, from -10 dB for the toughest modes down to -19 dB for HRP 16-QAM), symbol-timing accuracy (12.4.5.3, ±20 ppm, tightened to ±1.5 ppm relative to the coordinator), TX frequency accuracy (12.4.5.4), and power ramp-up/down (12.4.5.5). Clause 12.4.6 (Receiver characteristics) sets the error-rate criterion (12.4.6.1, a bit error rate below 1e-7 on a PN23 test sequence), sensitivity floors (12.4.6.2: below -70 dBm for LRP mode 1, below -50 dBm for HRP mode 0), and the maximum input level a receiver must tolerate (12.4.6.3). Clause 12.4.7 (Preambles and training symbols) closes the chapter with the exact frequency-domain tone tables for the 32-sample and 128-sample LRP OFDM training symbols and the HRP preamble symbols 5-8.
blocks.zh: 最后三个小节设定无线电的质量门槛。第 12.4.5 节（发射机要求）定义发射 PSD 掩模（12.4.5.1，信号必须落入其中的频谱'模板'）、误差矢量幅度限制（12.4.5.2，EVM——星座点落点与理想位置的接近程度，从最严苛模式的 −10 dB 到 HRP 16-QAM 的 −19 dB）、符号定时精度（12.4.5.3，±20 ppm，相对协调器收紧到 ±1.5 ppm）、发射频率精度（12.4.5.4），以及功率上升/下降斜坡（12.4.5.5）。第 12.4.6 节（接收机特性）规定错误率准则（12.4.6.1，在 PN23 测试序列上误比特率低于 1e-7）、灵敏度下限（12.4.6.2：LRP 模式 1 低于 −70 dBm，HRP 模式 0 低于 −50 dBm），以及接收机必须承受的最大输入电平（12.4.6.3）。第 12.4.7 节（前导码与训练符号）以 32 样本和 128 样本 LRP OFDM 训练符号及 HRP 前导码符号 5–8 的精确频域音调表结束本章。

summary.en: Coverage map: exactly where each 12.4.x clause lives
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：每个 12.4.x 小节的确切位置

blocks.en: 12.4.1 General (p.476) — two modes HRP + LRP, HRP rate table (Table 12-41, 0.95-3.8 Gb/s), LRP rate table (Table 12-42), MSB-only retransmission, and the four device configurations HR0/HRRX/HRTX/HRTR. 12.4.2 General requirements (p.477-480) — 12.4.2.1 channelization (one HRP + one LRP channel via CHNL_ID, Tables 12-43/12-44); 12.4.2.2 PHY timing (pSifsTime 2 us, pCcaDetectTime 9 us, pChannelSwitchTime 1000 us, IFS table 12-46); 12.4.2.3 data-size limits (HRP body 2^20-1, LRP 2^12-1, min fragment 512); 12.4.2.4 HCS (32-bit CRC). 12.4.3 Modulation + FEC (p.480-493) — HRP/LRP modulation params (Tables 12-47/12-48), base rate, repetition + spatial diversity (12.4.3.3), stuff bits, scrambler (12.4.3.5-6), Reed-Solomon outer code + interleaver (12.4.3.7-8), convolutional encoder + puncturing (12.4.3.9-10), data multiplexers EEP/UEP (12.4.3.11), tone interleaver and constellations (12.4.3.12-13). 12.4.4 Frame formats (p.494-501) — HRPDU/omni-LRPDU/directional-LRPDU (Figures 12-49/50/51), HRP preamble (M-sequence), HRP header with seven subframe headers + PHY control, LRP preamble sequences, long/short omni preambles, omni LRP header, directional preamble/header/payload with ACK Group bitmap. 12.4.5 TX requirements (p.502-504) — TX masks, EVM (Table 12-60), symbol timing ±20 ppm, frequency accuracy, power ramp. 12.4.6 RX characteristics (p.504) — BER<1e-7 (PN23), sensitivity (-70 dBm LRP / -50 dBm HRP), max input level (-30 dBm LRP / -24 dBm HRP). 12.4.7 Preambles + training symbols (p.504-505) — Tables 12-61/62/63 frequency-domain tone values for LRP and HRP training/preamble symbols.
blocks.zh: 12.4.1 概述（p.476）——两种模式 HRP + LRP，HRP 速率表（表 12-41，0.95–3.8 Gb/s），LRP 速率表（表 12-42），仅 MSB 重传，以及四种设备配置 HR0/HRRX/HRTX/HRTR。12.4.2 一般要求（p.477–480）——12.4.2.1 信道划分（经 CHNL_ID 配对一个 HRP + 一个 LRP 信道，表 12-43/12-44）；12.4.2.2 物理层定时（pSifsTime 2 us、pCcaDetectTime 9 us、pChannelSwitchTime 1000 us、IFS 表 12-46）；12.4.2.3 数据大小限制（HRP 体 2^20−1，LRP 2^12−1，最小分片 512）；12.4.2.4 HCS（32 位 CRC）。12.4.3 调制 + FEC（p.480–493）——HRP/LRP 调制参数（表 12-47/12-48）、基速率、重复 + 空间分集（12.4.3.3）、填充位、扰码器（12.4.3.5–6）、Reed-Solomon 外码 + 交织器（12.4.3.7–8）、卷积编码器 + 删余（12.4.3.9–10）、EEP/UEP 数据复用器（12.4.3.11）、音调交织器与星座（12.4.3.12–13）。12.4.4 帧格式（p.494–501）——HRPDU/全向 LRPDU/定向 LRPDU（图 12-49/50/51）、HRP 前导码（M 序列）、含七个子帧头 + PHY 控制的 HRP 头、LRP 前导码序列、长/短全向前导码、全向 LRP 头、含 ACK Group 位图的定向前导码/头/负载。12.4.5 发射要求（p.502–504）——发射掩模、EVM（表 12-60）、符号定时 ±20 ppm、频率精度、功率斜坡。12.4.6 接收特性（p.504）——BER<1e-7（PN23）、灵敏度（LRP −70 dBm / HRP −50 dBm）、最大输入电平（LRP −30 dBm / HRP −24 dBm）。12.4.7 前导码 + 训练符号（p.504–505）——表 12-61/62/63 给出 LRP 和 HRP 训练/前导码符号的频域音调值。

blocks.en: A reader's shortcut: HRP = the firehose for video payload; LRP = the always-on, robust messenger for everything else (beacons, control, ACKs, broadcast). Almost every detailed mechanism in 12.4 — channelization, timing, FEC chains, preambles, EVM and sensitivity numbers — is specified separately for these two PHYs because they make opposite trade-offs between speed and robustness.
blocks.zh: 读者的捷径：HRP = 视频负载的'消防水管'；LRP = 处理其他一切（信标、控制、ACK、广播）的常开、稳健信使。12.4 节中几乎每个细节机制——信道划分、定时、FEC 链、前导码、EVM 和灵敏度数值——都为这两个 PHY 分别规定，因为它们在速度与稳健性之间做出了相反的权衡。

cites.note: 12.4.1 General (HRP/LRP modes, rate tables, device configs); 12.4.2 General requirements (channelization, PHY timing, data-size limits, HCS); 12.4.3 start of modulation + FEC (params, repetition/diversity, stuff bits, scrambler).
12.4.3 subcarrier mapping; 12.4.4 AV PHY frame formats (HRPDU, omni/directional LRPDU, HRP preamble/header, LRP preamble sequences, long/short omni preambles, omni/directional headers and payload).

12.4.5 transmitter requirements (TX mask, EVM, symbol timing, frequency accuracy, power ramp); 12.4.6 receiver characteristics (error-rate criterion, sensitivity, max input); 12.4.7 preambles and training symbols (Tables 12-61/62/63).
